aiTitle: Configure UI display settings for data

content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>1. 都會
2. 固定12，但如果沒有任何資料時先用原本預設的
3. 暫定不顯示</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-09</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT
===========================
Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request.

Claude's Full Response to User:
這個確認解了最關鍵的一塊，也讓我看到一個**會靜默出錯的地雷**。先把更新後的理解攤開。

## 一、WheelData 真正結構（已和 Server 對齊）

```
WheelData: IIntAry[]            // number[][]
├─ [0].Data = MainGame 各格的「類型」陣列   (第一層 0 = MG)
└─ [1].Data = FreeGame 各格的「類型」陣列   (第一層 1 = FG)
```

每個 int 是「Wheel 功能類型」，**沒有倍率值**（value 拿掉）。

## 二、⚠️ 地雷：兩邊 enum 數字對不上

你給的 Server enum vs 專案現有的 `FeatureWheelSegmentType`：

| Server（你附圖） | 值 | 專案同值的意思 | 是否一致 |
|---|---|---|---|
| WheelFeatureFG（觸發FG）| 0 | SymbolConvert | ❌ 撞掉 |
| WheelFeatureMulti | 1 | Multiplier | ✅ 剛好同 |
| WheelFeatureUpgrade | 2 | Upgrade | ✅ 剛好同 |
| WheelFeatureTransfer（符號轉換）| 3 | GrandJP | ❌ 撞掉 |
| WheelFeatureGrand（Grand JP）| 4 | FreeGame | ❌ 撞掉 |
| WheelFeatureNone（未觸發）| -1 | （沒有這個） | ❌ 缺 |

**只有 1、2 巧合對上，0/3/4 全錯位**。如果照直覺寫 `type: rawInt as FeatureWheelSegmentType`，5 種裡有 3 種會掛**錯的 icon**，而且編譯不會報錯——這就是「正確地放大錯誤」的典型。所以串接的核心不是接線，是**型別轉換要顯式、不能直接 cast**。

## 三、建議做法：把 client enum 對齊 Server 編碼

兩條路：(A) 保留現有 enum + adapter 做一張對照表；(B) 直接把 `FeatureWheelSegmentType` 改成跟 Server 同號。

我**建議 (B)**，理由：Server 是權威來源、value 本來就要拔（型別模型已經要動）、passthrough adapter 沒有「對照表寫錯方向」的風險、而且這題本身就是兩個長得像但不同的 enum 害的——留兩個遲早再撞一次。

關鍵是：**美術 icon 順序的 indirection 由 `TYPE_ICON_CONFIG` 吸收**，所以即使 enum 改號，只要 `TYPE_ICON_CONFIG` 讓每個「類型概念」仍指向 prefab 裡它原本那張圖，美術完全不用動（DR-12 那條人工核對的風險被這層擋掉）。

串接點（adapter 帶 layer 參數，FeatureWheelManager 不碰 proto）：

```ts
// adapter（純邏輯層，結構化簽章不 import proto）
ParseServerWheelData(raw: Array<{Data?: number[]}>, layer: 0 | 1): SegmentDescriptor[]

// MG 進場 / decode 後：
eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, ParseServerWheelData(info.WheelData, 0));
// FG 進場（EnterFreeState）：
eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, ParseServerWheelData(info.WheelData, 1));
```

## 四、這已經不是微小任務——會波及這些

不只接 `SET_WHEEL_DATA`，連帶要動：

- `FeatureWheelTypes.ts`：enum 改號 + 加 `None=-1` + 重寫 `ParseServerWheelData`（吃 `IIntAry[]`+layer）+ `TYPE_ICON_CONFIG` 重指 + `GetDefaultSegments` 去掉 value
- `FeatureWheelManager.ts`：`SetWheelData`/`BindSegmentIcons` 的 `x{value}` Label 邏輯、`SpinResult.value`、`BuildRandomTestSegments` 全要清 value
- `GameView.ts` + `EnterFreeState.ts`：兩個 layer 的 dispatch
- `tests/FeatureWheelTypes.test.ts`：adapter 簽章/enum 一改就紅，要同步
- prefab：`WheelFeatureNone`（未觸發空格）要一張 icon

→ ≥ 4 檔，屬**中型偏大**。我會走「設計自檢 → 實作 → 審查 → 測試」輕量流程（可選開 `/dev-review`）。

## 五、動工前我要先確認 3 件事（會影響正確性，不想用猜的）

1. **FeatureWheel 在 MG 也會顯示嗎**，還是只在 FG？這決定 layer 0 要不要接、`SET_WHEEL_DATA` 在哪幾個時機派。
2. **每層 `Data` 長度是不是固定 12**（對齊物理 12 格）？若 MG/FG 長度不同或不是 12，adapter 的補/截策略要先講清楚。
3. **`WheelFeatureNone`（未觸發空格）顯示什麼**？有沒有空格 icon，還是沿用某張預設圖？

這 3 點你回我，我就能把設計定稿、開始改。或你要我先把「不依賴這 3 點」的部分（enum 對齊 + adapter 骨架）做掉，再回頭補也行——你決定。

Respond in this XML format:
<summary>
  <request>[Short title capturing the user's request AND the substance of what was discussed/done]</request>
  <investigated>[What has been explored so far? What was examined?]</investigated>
  <learned>[What have you learned about how things work?]</learned>
  <completed>[What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?]</completed>
  <next_steps>[What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?]</next_steps>
  <notes>[Additional insights or observations about the current progress]</notes>
</summary>

IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content.

Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

The user provided three responses in Chinese:
1. 都會 (Both will)
2. 固定12，但如果沒有任何資料時先用原本預設的 (Fixed 12, but if there's no data, use the original default)
3. 暫定不顯示 (Tentatively not displayed)

From Claude's full response, I can see this is about integrating server WheelData into a feature wheel system. The key points are:

1. **Request/Context**: User answered 3 clarification questions about WheelData integration - (1) whether feature wheel displays in both MG and FG, (2) data array length behavior, (3) how to display WheelFeatureNone segments

2. **Investigated**: 
   - Examined the server WheelData structure (IIntAry[] with layer 0=MainGame, layer 1=FreeGame)
   - Compared server enum values with existing client FeatureWheelSegmentType enum
   - Identified enum value mismatches (only 1 and 2 align, 0/3/4 are misaligned)

3. **Learned**:
   - WheelData contains type arrays only (no value field)
   - Critical enum mismatch discovered: server enum values don't match client enum values
   - Only Multiplier(1) and Upgrade(2) align; FreeGame(0), SymbolConvert(3), and GrandJP(4) are misaligned
   - Direct casting would cause silent bugs (wrong icons displayed)
   - Need explicit type conversion via adapter layer

4. **Completed**:
   - Clarified actual WheelData structure from server
   - Spotted the enum mismatch risk and proposed realigning the client enum to match server encoding
   - Designed an adapter approach that uses the layer parameter to handle the conversion

5. **Next Steps**:
   - User confirmed: (1) Both MG and FG will display wheel, (2) Fixed 12 segments with fallback to defaults, (3) WheelFeatureNone tentatively not displayed
   - Ready to implement the integration across 4+ files
   - Will follow design → implementation → review → test workflow

6. **Notes**:
   - This is a medium-large task affecting multiple files
   - The enum realignment prevents silent icon mapping bugs
   - TYPE_ICON_CONFIG layer absorbs the conversion logic

, so art assets don't need changes

<summary>
  <request>Clarified WheelData integration requirements: display mode, array length behavior, and empty segment handling</request>
  <investigated>Examined server WheelData structure (IIntAry[] with layer 0=MainGame, layer 1=FreeGame) and compared server enum encoding against existing client FeatureWheelSegmentType enum values to identify integration points and potential mismatches</investigated>
  <learned>Discovered critical enum value mismatch between server and client: only values 1 (Multiplier) and 2 (Upgrade) align correctly; values 0, 3, and 4 map to completely different feature types. Direct casting would cause silent bugs with wrong icons displayed. WheelData contains only type arrays (no value field). The TYPE_ICON_CONFIG indirection layer can absorb enum renumbering without requiring art asset changes</learned>
  <completed>User provided three key clarifications: (1) Feature wheel displays in both MainGame and FreeGame modes, (2) Data arrays are fixed at 12 segments with fallback to defaults when no server data exists, (3) WheelFeatureNone segments tentatively will not be displayed. Design approach finalized: realign client enum to match server encoding, implement layer-aware adapter (ParseServerWheelData with layer parameter), remove value field from segment model</completed>
  <next_steps>Implement WheelData integration across 4+ files: update FeatureWheelTypes.ts (realign enum values, add None=-1, rewrite ParseServerWheelData for IIntAry[] + layer, update TYPE_ICON_CONFIG, remove value from GetDefaultSegments), modify FeatureWheelManager.ts (strip value logic from SetWheelData/BindSegmentIcons/SpinResult/BuildRandomTestSegments), update GameView.ts and EnterFreeState.ts (dispatch with layer 0 and 1 respectively), sync tests</next_steps>
  <notes>This evolved from a simple data hookup into a medium-large refactor due to the enum mismatch hazard. The proposed solution (realigning client enum to server) prevents "correct code doing wrong things" silently. The 12-segment fixed length with default fallback simplifies the adapter logic. Not displaying WheelFeatureNone means no new icon asset needed for the None=-1 case</notes>
</summary>
```

content.thinking:
The primary Claude is now grepping the FeatureWheel code to survey where FeatureWheelSegmentType, SegmentDescriptor, SpinResult, and .value are used across the codebase. This is the discovery/survey phase before starting the refactor to:

1. Realign enum values to match server encoding
2. Remove the value field from the segment model
3. Implement the layer-aware ParseServerWheelData adapter

The grep shows usage in:
- FeatureWheelManager.ts: imports, type annotations, SetWheelData, value display logic (line 277-278 for multiplier labels), PlaySpin callback, BuildRandomTestSegments
- FeatureWheelTypes.ts: enum definition, interfaces (SegmentDescriptor, SpinResult), TYPE_ICON_CONFIG, helper functions (TypeToIconIndex, GetDefaultSegments, ParseServerWheelData)

This is investigation work to map out the scope before implementation begins.

```xml
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Surveyed FeatureWheel codebase usage patterns before enum realignment refactor</title>
  <subtitle>Mapped all references to FeatureWheelSegmentType, SegmentDescriptor, SpinResult, and value field across two core files</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>FeatureWheelManager.ts contains 6 value-dependent code paths: multiplier label display (line 277-278), PlaySpin callback (line 317), test segment builder (line 504), and debug logging (line 468)</fact>
    <fact>FeatureWheelTypes.ts defines SegmentDescriptor with optional value field, SpinResult with optional value field, and GetDefaultSegments returns 12 segments with 4 multiplier entries containing hardcoded values (2, 3, 5, 10)</fact>
    <fact>ParseServerWheelData currently casts raw.Type directly to FeatureWheelSegmentType and extracts raw.Value for multipliers, will require complete rewrite for IIntAry[] layer-based structure</fact>
    <fact>TYPE_ICON_CONFIG maps all 5 current enum values (SymbolConvert=0, Multiplier=1, Upgrade=2, GrandJP=3, FreeGame=4) to icon indices 0-4</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Before implementing the enum realignment to match server encoding, surveyed the entire FeatureWheel module to identify all touch points for the breaking changes. The grep revealed 55 lines across FeatureWheelManager.ts and FeatureWheelTypes.ts that reference the types and value field. Key findings: (1) Value field is actively used in 6 locations for multiplier display, callbacks, and test data; (2) Current ParseServerWheelData assumes {Type, Value} object structure and will need complete rewrite for the IIntAry[] format with layer parameter; (3) GetDefaultSegments hardcodes 4 multiplier values that will need removal; (4) TYPE_ICON_CONFIG currently uses sequential 0-4 indices that align with current enum but will need remapping when enum values change to match server encoding (FreeGame=0, Multiplier=1, Upgrade=2, SymbolConvert=3, GrandJP=4, None=-1). This survey confirms the medium-large refactor scope across 4+ files with at least 10 distinct modification sites.</narrative>

  </concepts>

</observation>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"g:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Common\\\\SpriteChange.ts\",\"content\":\"import { _decorator, Component, error, Sprite, SpriteFrame, warn } from 'cc';\\nconst { ccclass, property } = _decorator;\\n\\n/**\\n * SpriteChange\\n * 用於動態切換 Sprite 元件的圖片資源\\n * 可在編輯器中設定多個 SpriteFrame，透過索引切換顯示\\n */\\n@ccclass('SpriteChange')\\nexport class SpriteChange extends Component {\\n\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteFrame], tooltip: \\\"圖片資源陣列\\\" })\\n    private m_spriteFrames: SpriteFrame[] = [];\\n\\n    @property({ type: Sprite, tooltip: \\\"目標 Sprite 元件（未設定則自動獲取當前節點的 Sprite）\\\" })\\n    private m_targetSprite: Sprite = null;\\n\\n    private m_currentIndex: number = -1;\\n\\n    onLoad() {\\n        // 如果未手動設定目標 Sprite，則自動獲取當前節點的 Sprite 元件\\n        if (!this.m_targetSprite) {\\n            this.m_targetSprite = this.node.getComponent(Sprite);\\n            if (!this.m_targetSprite) {\\n                warn(`[SpriteChange] 節點 ${this.node.name} 上沒有找到 Sprite 元件`);\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 透過索引切換 Sprite 的圖片\\n     * @param index 圖片索引（從 0 開始）\\n     * @returns 是否切換成功\\n     */\\n    public ChangeSpriteByIndex(index: number): boolean {\\n        // 驗證索引範圍\\n        if (index < 0 || index >= this.m_spriteFrames.length) {\\n            error(`[SpriteChange] 索引 ${index} 超出範圍 [0, ${this.m_spriteFrames.length - 1}]`);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 驗證 Sprite 元件\\n        if (!this.m_targetSprite) {\\n            error(`[SpriteChange] 目標 Sprite 元件不存在`);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 驗證 SpriteFrame\\n        const spriteFrame = this.m_spriteFrames[index];\\n        if (!spriteFrame) {\\n            error(`[SpriteChange] 索引 ${index} 的 SpriteFrame 不存在`);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 切換圖片\\n        this.m_targetSprite.spriteFrame = spriteFrame;\\n        this.m_currentIndex = index;\\n\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 獲取當前顯示的圖片索引\\n     * @returns 當前索引，若未設定則返回 -1\\n     */\\n    public GetCurrentIndex(): number {\\n        return this.m_currentIndex;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 獲取圖片資源陣列的總數量\\n     * @returns 圖片數量\\n     */\\n    public GetSpriteFrameCount(): number {\\n        return this.m_spriteFrames.length;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 切換到下一張圖片（循環）\\n     * @returns 是否切換成功\\n     */\\n    public NextSprite(): boolean {\\n        if (this.m_spriteFrames.length === 0) {\\n            error(`[SpriteChange] 圖片陣列為空`);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        const nextIndex = (this.m_currentIndex + 1) % this.m_spriteFrames.length;\\n        return this.ChangeSpriteByIndex(nextIndex);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 切換到上一張圖片（循環）\\n     * @returns 是否切換成功\\n     */\\n    public PreviousSprite(): boolean {\\n        if (this.m_spriteFrames.length === 0) {\\n            error(`[SpriteChange] 圖片陣列為空`);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        const prevIndex = this.m_currentIndex <= 0\\n            ? this.m_spriteFrames.length -     <fact>BC-1 tests expect ParseServerWheelData to accept {Segments: [{Type, Value}]} structure and return exactly 10 segments, directly contradicting the confirmed server IIntAry[] format with 12 fixed-length arrays</fact>

    <fact>SpriteChange.ts provides ChangeSpriteByIndex(index) method used by FeatureWheelManager to switch segment icons, accepting 0-based index into m_spriteFrames array configured in prefab</fact>

  <narrative>Examined the existing test suite and icon switching utility before implementing the WheelData integration refactor. Critical finding: the entire test suite is built around a 10-segment wheel model with {Type, Value} object structure, fundamentally incompatible with the confirmed server format (IIntAry[] with 12-segment fixed-length arrays per layer). BC-1 and BC-2 tests extensively validate ParseServerWheelData behavior for 10-segment outputs with value extraction from multiplier segments—all of this will require complete rewrite. The test also validates that GetDefaultSegments returns 10 segments with hardcoded multiplier values at specific positions. SpriteChange component investigation confirms FeatureWheelManager's icon switching mechanism: it uses index-based ChangeSpriteByIndex() to select from a prefab-configured SpriteFrame array, meaning TYPE_ICON_CONFIG can safely map enum values to icon indices without coupling to enum numerical values. The refactor must: (1) update FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT from 10 to 12, (2) rewrite ParseServerWheelData signature and implementation completely, (3) update GetDefaultSegments to return 12 segments without values, (4) rewrite all BC-1, BC-2 test cases for new structure.</narrative>

This method runs after initial setup (pausing main BGM, setting IsFreeGame flag, hiding UI) but before the free game music and round UI display. The WheelData dispatch with layer=1 parameter needs to occur either at the start of PlayGoldBlitzRoulette or immediately before it, matching the pattern where GameView.ts will dispatch layer=0 for main game initialization. The state machine structure shows this is a one-time transition (not a recurring event), confirming the WheelData only needs to be set once per game mode entry. The parallel multiplier and cash animation sequences that follow are independent of wheel configuration.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>decision</type>
  <title>Confirmed WheelData integration requirements for both game modes with 12-segment fixed length</title>
  <subtitle>Feature wheel displays in MainGame and FreeGame with 12 fixed segments defaulting to original fallback</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Feature wheel confirmed to display in both MainGame (layer 0) and FreeGame (layer 1) modes, requiring WheelData dispatch at both GameView initialization and EnterFreeState entry</fact>
    <fact>WheelData arrays confirmed as fixed 12-segment length matching physical wheel, with fallback to GetDefaultSegments when server provides no data</fact>
    <fact>WheelFeatureNone segments (server value -1) confirmed to tentatively not display any visual representation, eliminating need for new icon asset</fact>
    <fact>FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT constant must change from 10 to 12 to match confirmed server structure</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>User confirmed three critical design requirements for the WheelData integration refactor. First, the feature wheel appears in both main game and free game modes (not FreeGame-only), requiring ParseServerWheelData dispatches with layer=0 in GameView initialization and layer=1 in EnterFreeState.PlayGoldBlitzRoulette. Second, the server always sends exactly 12 segments per layer matching the physical wheel geometry, but when WheelData is absent the client falls back to GetDefaultSegments—this simplifies the adapter (no length validation needed, just handle null/undefined/malformed cases). Third, WheelFeatureNone segments will not render visually, avoiding the need to source a new icon asset and simplifying the TYPE_ICON_CONFIG mapping. These decisions finalize the implementation scope: update segment count constant from 10→12, rewrite ParseServerWheelData to accept IIntAry[] + layer parameter, strip value field from SegmentDescriptor/SpinResult/GetDefaultSegments, realign enum to server encoding (FreeGame=0, Multiplier=1, Upgrade=2, SymbolConvert=3, GrandJP=4, None=-1), and update all test cases for 12-segment expectations.</narrative>

  </concepts>

content.thinking:
The user has made two edits:

1. Added a `ClearSprite()` method to SpriteChange.ts to handle clearing sprite frames (for the None type that shouldn't display)
2. Updated FeatureWheelTypes.ts to:
   - Add None = -1 to the enum
   - Remove value field from SegmentDescriptor and SpinResult interfaces
   - Add warning about server enum being different and requiring explicit mapping
   - Updated comments

These are the first concrete code changes in the WheelData integration refactor. I should record this as actual implementation work.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Removed value field from wheel segment model and added None type handling</title>
  <subtitle>Stripped multiplier value from SegmentDescriptor and SpinResult, added ClearSprite for empty segments</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>FeatureWheelSegmentType enum extended with None=-1 for untriggered segments, with warning comment that client enum differs from ServerWheelFeature encoding</fact>
    <fact>SegmentDescriptor.value optional field removed entirely, changing interface from {type, value?} to {type} only</fact>
    <fact>SpinResult.value optional field removed, simplifying callback signature from {index, type, value?} to {index, type}</fact>
    <fact>SpriteChange.ClearSprite() method added to set spriteFrame=null and currentIndex=-1 for None-type segments that render as blank</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented the first phase of the WheelData integration refactor by stripping the value field from the segment data model. SegmentDescriptor and SpinResult interfaces no longer carry the optional value property that was previously used for multiplier amounts—this aligns with the confirmed server IIntAry[] structure that only provides type integers without associated values. Added FeatureWheelSegmentType.None=-1 with explicit warning that client enum numbering differs from server encoding and requires MapServerFeatureToSegmentType explicit mapping (prohibiting direct casting). Extended SpriteChange utility with ClearSprite() method to handle None segments by nulling the spriteFrame instead of hiding nodes, providing safer rendering for empty wheel slots. These changes are breaking: all downstream code referencing seg.value or result.value will now fail TypeScript compilation, forcing explicit updates in FeatureWheelManager (multiplier label display, PlaySpin callback, test segment builder) and test suite.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/Common/SpriteChange.ts</file>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

${landIndex} 格`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN, landIndex, (result: SpinResult) => {\\n                    const valueText = result.value === undefined ? '-' : result.value;\\n                    log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 落點結果 index=${result.index} type=${result.type} value=${valueText}`);\\n                });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 重設隨機輪盤資料');\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, this.BuildRandomTestSegments());\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                this.m_testUIShown = !this.m_testUIShown;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 切換 UI 顯示 → ${this.m_testUIShown}`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(this.m_testUIShown ? FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI : FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI);\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 產生 12 格隨機測試資料（type 隨機；Multiplier 帶隨機倍數）\\n     */\\n    private BuildRandomTestSegments(): SegmentDescriptor[] {\\n        const types = [\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame,\\n        ];\\n        const multiplierValues = [2, 3, 5, 10, 20];\\n        const segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const type = types[Math.floor(Math.random() * types.length)];\\n            const seg: SegmentDescriptor = { type };\\n            if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier) {\\n                seg.value = multiplierValues[Math.floor(Math.random() * multiplierValues.length)];\\n            }\\n            segments.push(seg);\\n        }\\n        return segments;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 測試功能\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":28,\"oldLines\":7,\"newStart\":28,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\" \",\"     /**\",\"      * @ch 設置 12 格輪盤資料（server 給）\",\"-     * @param segments SegmentDescriptor[]（每格 type + 選填 value）\",\"+     * @param segments SegmentDescriptor[]（每格 type；None 格不顯示）\",\"      */\",\"     SET_WHEEL_DATA: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SET_WHEEL_DATA',\",\" \"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

warn, error, EventKeyboard, Input, input, KeyCode, log } from 'cc';\\nimport { DEV, DEBUG } from 'cc/env';\\nimport GameView from '../GameView';\\nimport { eventManager } from 'db://astarte-framework/Managers';\\nimport { SpriteChange } from '../Common/SpriteChange';\\nimport {\\n    SegmentDescriptor,\\n    SpinResult,\\n    FeatureWheelSegmentType,\\n _decorator;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 事件（獨立命名空間，與舊 MULTIPLIER_EVENT 不衝突，支援共存）\\n */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT = {\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化\\n     * @param gameView 遊戲視窗\\n     */\\n    INIT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_INIT',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格輪盤資料（server 給）\\n     * @param segments SegmentDescriptor[]（每格 type；None 格不顯示）\\n     */\\n    SET_WHEEL_DATA: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SET_WHEEL_DATA',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback (選填) (result: SpinResult) => void\\n     */\\n    PLAY_SPIN: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_PLAY_SPIN',\\n\\n    /**@ch 顯示 UI*/\\n    SHOW_UI: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW_UI',\\n\\n    /**@ch 隱藏 UI*/\\n    HIDE_UI: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_UI',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉\\n     * PlaySpin 後輪盤停住不自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束，由呼叫端 dispatch 此事件才繼續緩轉\\n     */\\n    RESUME_IDLE: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_RESUME_IDLE',\\n};\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 輪盤 UI 元件\\n * 單一職責：顯示 12 格、平時 Idle 緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager extends Component {\\n    //#region 屬性\\n    /**@ch 根節點（顯示/隱藏）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '根節點' })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 輪盤旋轉節點（轉動的是這個，頂端指針固定不動）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '輪盤旋轉節點' })\\n    private m_wheelNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格 icon 的 SpriteChange（順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteChange], displayName: '12 格 icon SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_segmentSpriteChanges: SpriteChange[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格乘倍數值 Label（非乘倍格留空字串；順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Label], displayName: '12 格乘倍數值 Label' })\\n    private m_segmentValueLabels: Label[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格落點演出節點（高亮+scale 的目標；順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 2.5;\\n    /**@ch 落點演出放大倍率*/\\n    private static readonly ANNOUNCE_SCALE = 1.25;\\n    /**@ch 落點演出單段時間（秒）*/\\n    private static readonly ANNOUNCE_TIME = 0.18;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 10 取前 10\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 10 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon 與乘倍數值（BC-5 / BC-4 / EH-2 未知 type）\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon（BC-4：未知 type 由 TypeToIconIndex 回傳預設索引；無資料格用預設）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(seg ? TypeToIconIndex(seg.type) : DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX);\\n            }\\n\\n            // 乘倍數值（BC-5：僅乘倍格顯示 x{value}；其餘格空字串）\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = (seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier && seg.value !== undefined)\\n                    ? `x${seg.value}`\\n                    : '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type, value: seg.value });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 + scale 彈一下，演出完成才 resolve（BC-7）\\n     * 預留接口：未來可在此依 type 改播專屬 Spine 演出\\n     */\\n    private PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_SCALE;\\n            const t = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_TIME;\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(s, s, s) }, { easing: 'backOut' })\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(1, 1, 1) }, { easing: 'backIn' })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n content.thinking:
This is a major change to the ParseServerWheelData function and related structures. Let me break down what was done:

1. **GetDefaultSegments() updated**: Removed all `value` fields from the multiplier entries, changed the composition from "3 符號轉換 + 4 乘倍 + 3 升級 + 1 GRAND JP + 1 Free Game" to "3 符號轉換 + 3 乘倍 + 3 升級 + 1 GRAND JP + 1 Free Game + 1 升級補滿" (12 total instead of hardcoded multiplier values).

2. **Added ServerWheelFeature enum**: This represents the server-side encoding:
   - None = -1
   - FreeGame = 0 (MG specific)
   - Multiplier = 1
   - Upgrade = 2
   - Transfer = 3 (symbol convert)
   - Grand = 4 (FG specific)

3. **Added WheelDataLayer enum**: To distinguish MainGame (0) from FreeGame (1)

4. **Added MapServerFeatureToSegmentType() function**: Explicit mapping function that converts server enum values to client enum values, with fallback to None for unknown values. This is the critical safety mechanism to prevent the "silent wrong icon" bug.

5. **Completely rewrote ParseServerWheelData()**:
   - **Old signature**: `ParseServerWheelData(raw: any): SegmentDescriptor[]`
   - **New signature**: `ParseServerWheelData(raw: ReadonlyArray<{ Data?: number[] | null }> | null | undefined, layer: WheelDataLayer): SegmentDescriptor[]`
   - Changed from expecting `{Segments: [{Type, Value}]}` structure to `IIntAry[]` with layer indexing
   - Extracts `layerData = raw[layer]?.Data` and returns the full 12-segment fallback if no data exists. When data is present, it iterates through all 12 positions, converting each server value via MapServerFeatureToSegmentType, with missing segments defaulting to ServerWheelFeature.None. This dual-enum approach with explicit mapping prevents direct casting errors that would silently produce wrong icons.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Implemented server WheelData adapter with explicit enum mapping and layer-based parsing</title>
  <subtitle>ParseServerWheelData now accepts IIntAry structure with layer parameter, mapping server encoding through dedicated translator</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>ServerWheelFeature enum added with server protocol encoding: None=-1, FreeGame=0, Multiplier=1, Upgrade=2, Transfer=3, Grand=4</fact>
    <fact>WheelDataLayer enum added to distinguish MainGame=0 from FreeGame=1 when indexing WheelData first dimension</fact>
    <fact>MapServerFeatureToSegmentType() function provides explicit switch-based mapping from server enum to client FeatureWheelSegmentType, defaulting unknown values to None</fact>
    <fact>ParseServerWheelData signature changed from (raw: any) to (raw: ReadonlyArray<{Data?: number[] | null}> | null | undefined, layer: WheelDataLayer), extracting raw[layer]?.Data for 12-segment iteration</fact>
    <fact>GetDefaultSegments updated to remove all value fields and adjust composition to 3 each of SymbolConvert/Multiplier/Upgrade plus 1 each of GrandJP/Upgrade/FreeGame totaling 12 segments</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented the complete server integration adapter for WheelData, replacing the temporary {Segments: [{Type, Value}]} structure with the confirmed IIntAry[] protocol format. The new implementation introduces two critical safety mechanisms: (1) ServerWheelFeature enum explicitly documents the server-side encoding that differs from client FeatureWheelSegmentType, preventing accidental direct casts; (2) MapServerFeatureToSegmentType() provides mandatory explicit mapping between the two enums using a switch statement, ensuring any unknown server values safely default to None rather than displaying wrong icons. ParseServerWheelData now accepts a layer parameter (MainGame=0 or FreeGame=1) to extract the appropriate Data array from the IIntAry[] structure, iterating exactly 12 times regardless of input and mapping each integer through the translator. Missing or malformed layer data triggers full fallback to GetDefaultSegments. The structured signature ReadonlyArray<{Data?: number[] | null}> maintains pure logic layer independence from protocol types while providing type safety. This architecture completely eliminates the identified "silent wrong icon" hazard where only values 1 and 2 accidentally aligned between server and client enums.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

= NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 10 取前 10\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 10 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon 與乘倍數值（BC-5 / BC-4 / EH-2 未知 type）\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon（BC-4：未知 type 由 TypeToIconIndex 回傳預設索引；無資料格用預設）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(seg ? TypeToIconIndex(seg.type) : DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX);\\n            }\\n\\n            // 乘倍數值（BC-5：僅乘倍格顯示 x{value}；其餘格空字串）\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = (seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier && seg.value !== undefined)\\n                    ? `x${seg.value}`\\n                    : '';\\n return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 + scale 彈一下，演出完成才 resolve（BC-7）\\n     * 預留接口：未來可在此依 type 改播專屬 Spine 演出\\n     */\\n    private PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_SCALE;\\n            const t = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_TIME;\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(s, s, s) }, { easing: 'backOut' })\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(1, 1, 1) }, { easing: 'backIn' })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, GetDefaultSegments());\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3  return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type, value: seg.value });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 + scale 彈一下，演出完成才 resolve（BC-7）\\n     * 預留接口：未來可在此依 type 改播專屬 Spine 演出\\n     */\\n    private PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_SCALE;\\n            const t = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_TIME;\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(s, s, s) }, { easing: 'backOut' })\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(1, 1, 1) }, { easing: 'backIn' })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 FeatureWheel 功能\\n     * DIGIT_1：初始化 + 設定預設輪盤資料 + 顯示 UI（一鍵就緒）\\n     * DIGIT_2：轉動到下一格（循環 0~11）並印出落點結果（驗證旋轉/落點演出/callback）\\n     * DIGIT_3：重設隨機輪盤資料（驗證 icon 與乘倍數值動態更新）\\n     * DIGIT_4：切換顯示/隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard) {\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 初始化 + 設定預設資料 + 顯示 UI');\\n                // INIT 僅需非 null 物件以通過參數驗證並翻起 m_isInit；\\n                // m_gameView 在本元件未被讀取，測試以 this.node 佔位即可\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT, this.node);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, GetDefaultSegments());\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2: {\\n                const landIndex = this.m_testLandIndex % FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT;\\n                this.m_testLandIndex++;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 轉動到第 ${landIndex} 格`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN, landIndex, (result: SpinResult) => {\\n                    const valueText = result.value === undefined ? '-' : result.value;\\n                    log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 落點結果 index=${result.index} type=${result.type} value=${valueText}`);\\n                });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 重設隨機輪盤資料');\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, this.BuildRandomTestSegments());\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                this.m_testUIShown = !this.m_testUIShown;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 切換 UI 顯示 → ${this.m_testUIShown}`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(this.m_testUIShown ? FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI : FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI);\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 產生 12 格隨機測試資料（type 隨機；Multiplier 帶隨機倍數）\\n     */\\n    private BuildRandomTestSegments(): SegmentDescriptor[] {\\n        const types = [\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame,\\n        ];\\n        const multiplierValues = [2, 3, 5, 10, 20];\\n        const segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const type = types[Math.floor(Math.random() * types.length)];\\n            const seg: SegmentDescriptor = { type };\\n            if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier) {\\n                seg.value = multiplierValues[Math.floor(Math.random() * multiplierValues.length)];\\n            }\\n            segments.push(seg);\\n        }\\n        return segments;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 測試功能\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":316,\"oldLines\":7,\"newStart\":316,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\"             const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\",\"             // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\",\"             try {\",\"-                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type, value: seg.value });\",\"+                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\",\"             } catch (cbErr) {\",\"                 error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\",\"             }\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2: {\\n                const landIndex = this.m_testLandIndex % aiTitle: Configure UI display settings for data

content.thinking:
The user is providing more observed tool executions. Let me create observations for these edits.

First edit: Updates BindSegmentIcons to handle None type and removes value-based logic
- Changes icon binding to use ClearSprite() for None types
- Removes all multiplier value display logic
- Clears all labels unconditionally

Second edit: Removes value from PlaySpin callback
- Changes callback from passing {index, type, value} to just {index, type}

These are continuation of the refactor to remove value fields from the segment model.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Completed value field removal from FeatureWheelManager icon binding and spin callback</title>
  <subtitle>BindSegmentIcons now clears sprites for None types, PlaySpin callback no longer passes value property</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>BindSegmentIcons rewritten to call spriteChange.ClearSprite() when segment type is None or segment data is missing, otherwise calls ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type))</fact>
    <fact>Multiplier value label display logic completely removed from BindSegmentIcons, replaced with unconditional label.string = '' to clear any residual text from previous configurations</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpin callback construction changed from callback?.({index, type, value: seg.value}) to callback?.({index, type}), matching updated SpinResult interface without value field</fact>
    <fact>Comment updated from "依當前資料綁定各格 icon 與乘倍數值" to "依當前資料綁定各格 icon" noting "倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留"</fact>
    <fact>Two remaining TypeScript errors: CheckTestKeyCode line 468 still logs result.value, BuildRandomTestSegments lines 503-504 still assign seg.value for Multiplier types</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed the core production code path for value field removal by updating FeatureWheelManager's icon binding and spin callback logic. BindSegmentIcons now implements None-type handling by detecting FeatureWheelSegmentType.None or null segments and calling the newly added SpriteChange.ClearSprite() to render those slots as blank (matching the "tentatively not displayed" requirement). For valid non-None segments, it uses TypeToIconIndex which internally handles unknown types with default fallback, eliminating the need for DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX import. The multiplier value display logic that checked seg.value !== undefined has been completely removed, replaced with unconditional label clearing to prevent residual "x2", "x5" text from persisting across data updates. PlaySpin callback construction now omits the value property, constructing SpinResult as {index, type} only. However, test/debug code still contains two compilation errors: the DIGIT_2 test keypress handler at line 468 logs result.value (which no longer exists), and BuildRandomTestSegments at lines 503-504 assigns seg.value for randomly generated Multiplier segments (also invalid after interface change). These test-only errors need cleanup but don't affect production runtime.</narrative>
  <concepts>

    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

this.m_freeBgmId = AudioManager.Play( AudioManager.AudioClips.FG_Bgm, true );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 停止免費遊戲背景音樂\\n     */\\n    StopFreeGameBgm()\\n    {\\n        if error(\\\"載入測試資料檔案失敗:\\\", loadError);\\n            // 即使載入失敗，也確保陣列已初始化\\n            this.m_realFeatureSpinAck = [];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得特色玩法測試盤面\\n     * @param featuresType 特色類型\\n     * @returns 測試盤面\\n     */\\n    GetFeatureSpinAckForDemo(featuresType: number): protocol.ar2es2Proto.ISpinAck\\n    {\\n        if (this.m_realFeatureSpinAck.length === 0 || featuresType < 0 || featuresType >= this.m_realFeatureSpinAck.length)\\n        {\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n        return this.m_realFeatureSpinAck[featuresType];\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得特色玩法測試盤面數量\\n     * @returns 特色玩法測試盤面數量\\n     */\\n    GetFeatureSpinAckLengthForDemo(): number\\n    {\\n        return this.m_realFeatureSpinAck.length;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 載入測試資料（同步版本）\\n     * @param fileName 檔案名稱（不含副檔名）\\n     * @returns BufferAsset 資料\\n     */\\n    LoadBinaryFile(fileName: string): BufferAsset\\n    {\\n        return this.m_BinaryFileForDemo.find(file => file.name === fileName);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 載入測試資料（同步版本）\\n     * @param fileName 檔案名稱（不含副檔名）\\n     * @returns protocol.ar2es2Proto.ISpinAck 解碼後的 SpinAck 資料\\n     */\\n    LoadDemoDataSync(triggerKey: number): protocol.ar2es2Proto.ISpinAck\\n    {\\n        let fileName = \\\"eyestrike_triggerkey_\\\" + triggerKey;\\n\\n        // 使用同步載入方式\\n        const asset = this.LoadBinaryFile(fileName);\\n        \\n        if (!asset) {\\n            error(`載入測試檔案 ${fileName} 失敗: 檔案不存在`);\\n            throw new Error(`測試檔案 ${fileName} 不存在`);\\n        }\\n        \\n        try {\\n            let spinAckData: protocol.ar2es2Proto.ISpinAck;\\n            if (asset && asset.validate())\\n            {\\n                const uint8Array = new Uint8Array(asset.buffer());\\n                spinAckData = protocol.ar2es2Proto.SpinAck.decode(uint8Array);\\n                return spinAckData;\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                error(`載入測試檔案 ${fileName} 失敗: 檔案不存在`);\\n                throw new Error(`測試檔案 ${fileName} 不存在`);\\n            }\\n        } catch (parseError) {\\n            error(`解析測試檔案 ${fileName} 失敗:`, parseError);\\n            throw parseError;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Demo\\n \\n    //#region Extra Bet    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化Extra Bet\\n     */\\n    private
