   // isForce=true 為 ForceSetExtraBet 觸發（如 unshow 還原），不需播全版宣告動畫\\n                this.ClearAllForExtraBet();\\n                if (_isActive && !_isForce) {\\n                    await this.PlayExtraBetActiveAnimation();\\n                    isPlayActiveAnimation = true;\\n                }\\n                if (_isActive) {\\n                    if (!isPlayActiveAnimation) {\\n                        this.m_slotReels.SetExtraBetInitPlateInfo();\\n                    }\\n                } else {\\n                    this.m_slotReels.SetInitPlateInfo();\\n                }\\n            },\\n            Game_Define.StringKey.EXTRA_BET_DESC,\\n            Game_Define.StringKey.MG_SPECIAL_TXT\\n        );\\n\\n        // 遊戲啟動時先隱藏，等 info ack 到齊後再透過 ShowExtraBet() 顯示\\n        this.m_extraBetComp?.ShowExtra( false );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch unshow 還原時把 ExtraBet 同步成開啟狀態（m_isExtra / 按鈕 UI / multiBet）\\n     * @description 透過 framework 的 ForceSetExtraBet 強制設值，搭配 InitExtraBet 中 isForce 分支跳過全版宣告動畫\\n     */\\n    public async RestoreExtraBetState() {\\n        await this.m_extraBetComp?.ForceSetExtraBet( true );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示 Extra Bet 按鈕（info ack 就緒後呼叫）\\n     */\\n    private ShowExtraBet() {\\n        this.m_extraBetComp?.ShowExtra( true );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 首次進入 IDLE 時自動展開 Extra Bet Bar 並顯示說明\\n     */\\n    async ExtraBetFirstShowBar() {\\n        await this.m_extraBetComp?.FirstShowBar();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放Extra Bet啟用動畫\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExtraBetActiveAnimation() {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(EXTRA_BET_EFFECT_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_ACTIVATE_EFFECT, resolve);\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清除所有狀態（Extra Bet 專用）\\n     */\\n    ClearAllForExtraBet() {\\n        this.ClearAll();\\n        if (!this.IsRespinGame)\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_UI_EVENT.HIDE_LIGHT_LEFT_REEL);\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_UI_EVENT.HIDE_LIGHT_RIGHT_REEL);\\n        }\\n        eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_UI_EVENT.PREWIN_FRAME_FADE_OUT, -1);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Extra Bet\\n\\n    //#region 震動\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放全畫面震動效果\\n     * @param callback 完成後回調\\n     * @param delay 延遲時間\\n     * @returns Promise 全畫面震動效果完成的 Promise\\n     */\\n    async PlayFullScreenShakeEffect(callback?: () => void, delay: number = 0): Promise<void> {\\n        if (!this.m_fullScreenShakeComponent) {\\n            callback?.();\\n            return Promise.resolve();\\n        }\\n\\n        await Define.Wait(this, delay);\\n        this.m_fullScreenShakeComponent.shake();\\n        await Define.Wait(this, this.m_fullScreenShakeComponent.Duration);\\n        callback?.();\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 震動\\n\\n    //#region 假轉輪\\n    /**@ch 即時解析假轉輪投注模式（僅供 OnRecvSpinAck 內部拍照用） */\\n    private ResolveFakeReelBetMode(): FakeReelBetMode\\n    {\\n        if ( this.GetBuyBonusIndex() != null || (this.m_unshowSpinAck != null && /**@ch 更新假轉輪投注模式快取 */\\n    public UpdateFakeReelBetMode()\\n    {\\n        this.m_cachedFakeReelBetMode = this.ResolveFakeReelBetMode();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 強制設定假轉輪投注模式快取\\n     * @param betMode 假轉輪投注模式\\n     */\\n    ForceSetFakeReelBetMode(betMode: FakeReelBetMode)\\n    {\\n        this.m_cachedFakeReelBetMode = betMode;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 假轉輪\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵\\n     * Q → PlaySymbolConversion  W → PlayCashUpgrade\\n     * E → PlayMultiplier        R → PlayFreeGameEnter\\n     *\\n     * W / E 會動態掃描目前盤面找 Cash / Mystery 格子當假資料來源，\\n     * 所以測試前盤面上最好要有 Cash 或 Mystery 符號才能看到完整演出。\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode( event: EventKeyboard )\\n    {\\n        const ctrl = new FeatureShowController( this );\\n\\n / 250 / 500（不管盤面現況，直接蓋靜態節點）\\n            case KeyCode.KEY_Q:\\n            {\\n                log( \\\"[TEST] Q → PlaySymbolConversion（假資料）\\\" );\\n                const markedPositions: CellPos[] const upgradeList: UpgradeInfo[] = [];\\n                const fakeMysteryValues = [ 1000, 2000, 5000 ];\\n                outer:\\n                for ( let col = 0; col < Game_Define.COL; col++ )\\n                {\\n                    const rowCount = Game_Define.ROW_CONFIG[ col ] ?? Game_Define.ROW;\\n                    for ( let row = 0; row < rowCount; row++ )\\n                    {\\n                        const sym = this.SlotReels.GetSymbolInRealPlateInfo( col, row );\\n                        if ( sym?.Symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.Cash )\\n                        {\\n                            upgradeList.push( {\\n                                col, row,\\n                                symbol  : Game_Define.Symbol.Mystery,\\n                                number  : fakeMysteryValues[ upgradeList.length ] ?? 1000,\\n                                jpState : 0,\\n                            } );\\n                            if ( upgradeList.length >= 3 ) break outer;\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                if ( upgradeList.length === 0 )\\n                {\\n                    log( \\\"[TEST] W：盤面目前沒有 Cash 符號，按 Q 先轉換一些再試\\\" );\\n                    break;\\n                }\\n                log( \\\"[TEST] W：找到 Cash 格:\\\", upgradeList );\\n                ctrl.PlayCashUpgrade( upgradeList )\\n                    .catch( e => error( \\\"[TEST] PlayCashUpgrade 失敗:\\\", e ) );\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            // ── E：Multiplier ──────────────────────────────────────────────\\n            // 動態掃描盤面，找最多 2 格 Cash 或 Mystery，倍率依序為 2x / 3x\\n            case KeyCode.KEY_E:\\n            {\\n                log( \\\"[TEST] E → PlayMultiplier（從盤面找 Cash/Mystery 格）\\\" );\\n                const targets: MultiplierInfo[] = [];\\n                const fakeMultipliers = [ 2, 3 ];\\n                outer:\\n                for ( let col = 0; col < Game_Define.COL; col++ )\\n                {\\n                    const rowCount = Game_Define.ROW_CONFIG[ col ] ?? Game_Define.ROW;\\n                    for ( let row = 0; row < rowCount; row++ )\\n                    {\\n                        const sym = this.SlotReels.GetSymbolInRealPlateInfo( col, row );\\n                        if (\\n                            sym?.Symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.Cash ||\\n                            sym?.Symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.Mystery\\n                        )\\n                        {\\n                            targets.push( {\\n                                col, row,\\n                                multiplier: fakeMultipliers[ targets.length ] ?? 2,\\n                            } );\\n                            if ( targets.length >= 2 ) break outer;\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                }\\n                if ( targets.length === 0 )\\n                {\\n                    log( \\\"[TEST] E：盤面目前沒有 Cash/Mystery 符號，按 Q 先轉換一些再試\\\" );\\n                    break;\\n                }\\n                log( \\\"[TEST] E：找到乘倍目標:\\\", targets );\\n                ctrl.PlayMultiplier( targets )\\n                    .catch( e => error( \\\"[TEST] PlayMultiplier 失敗:\\\", e ) );\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            // ── R：FreeGame Enter ──────────────────────────────────────────\\n            // 假資料：現有 Scatter 固定在 (0,1)(5,2)，補充 Scatter 在 (2,3)\\n            case KeyCode.KEY_R:\\n            {\\n                log( \\\"[TEST] R → PlayFreeGameEnter（假資料）\\\" );\\n                const scatterPositions: CellPos[]    = [ { col: 0, row: 1 }, { col: 5, row: 2 } ];\\n                const supplementPositions: CellPos[] = [ { col: 2, row: 3 } ];\\n                ctrl.PlayFreeGameEnter( scatterPositions, supplementPositions )\\n                    .catch( e => error( \\\"[TEST] PlayFreeGameEnter 失敗:\\\", e ) );\\n                break;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 測試功能\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":104,\"oldLines\":6,\"newStart\":104,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\" import { DEBUG } from \\\"cc/env\\\";\",\" import { REEL_UI_EVENT } from \\\"./ReelUIManager\\\";\",\" import { FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT } from \\\"./FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager\\\";\",\"+import { ParseServerWheelData, WheelDataLayer } from \\\"./FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes\\\";\",\" \",\" //=============================================================\",\" //#region 變數\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Integrated MainGame WheelData dispatch into info ack handler and updated test imports</title>
  <subtitle>GameView OnCommand now dispatches parsed layer 0 WheelData after FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT during server initialization</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>GameView.OnCommand info ack handler adds eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, ParseServerWheelData(info.WheelData, WheelDataLayer.MainGame)) immediately after FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT dispatch</fact>
    <fact>Comment added noting "設定主遊戲(MG)輪盤資料；FG 那層待 FG 顯示流程接上時改傳 WheelDataLayer.FreeGame" documenting future FreeGame layer integration point</fact>
    <fact>FeatureWheelTypes.test.ts import block extended with SegmentDescriptor and WheelDataLayer type imports preparing test file for new signature</fact>
    <fact>MainGame feature wheel now receives server-provided WheelData during game initialization, parsed through MapServerFeatureToSegmentType adapter to prevent enum mismatch icon errors</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed the MainGame layer WheelData integration by wiring the info ack handler in GameView.OnCommand to dispatch the parsed wheel configuration immediately after feature wheel initialization. The call sequence is now: (1) FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT passes this reference to FeatureWheelManager, (2) FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA passes ParseServerWheelData(info.WheelData, WheelDataLayer.MainGame) which extracts info.WheelData[0].Data, maps each integer through the ServerWheelFeature→FeatureWheelSegmentType translator, and returns 12 SegmentDescriptors (or GetDefaultSegments fallback if layer data is missing/malformed). This ensures the MainGame feature wheel displays the server-configured segment types from the moment the player enters the game. The comment explicitly notes that FreeGame layer (WheelDataLayer.FreeGame) dispatch will be added later in the EnterFreeState flow, establishing a clear pattern for dual-layer support. Test file imports updated to include the new types, preparing for test suite rewrite to match the 12-segment IIntAry[] + layer signature. This completes the production integration for MainGame; FreeGame dispatch remains TODO.</narrative>
```

content.thinking:
This is a comprehensive rewrite of the BC-1 and BC-2 test cases to match the new ParseServerWheelData signature and behavior:

**BC-1 Changes:**
- Old: tested `{Segments: [{Type, Value}]}` structure expecting 10 segments
- New: tests `IIntAry[]` structure with layer parameter expecting 12 segments
- Now validates:
  - Layer selection (MainGame=0, FreeGame=1)
  - Server→Client enum mapping through MapServerFeatureToSegmentType
  - All 6 ServerWheelFeature values (0=FG→FreeGame, 1=Multi→Multiplier, 2=Upgrade→Upgrade, 3=Transfer→SymbolConvert, 4=Grand→GrandJP, -1=None→None)
  - Value field removal (checks `mg[1].value === undefined`)
  
**BC-2 Changes:**
- Old: tested fallback for 10-segment {Segments} structure
- New: tests fallback for 12-segment layer-based structure
- Uses `isDefault` helper to validate entire array matches GetDefaultSegments
- Tests comprehensive fallback scenarios:
  - null/undefined raw
  - Empty array
  - Missing target layer (requesting FreeGame when only MainGame exists)
  - Layer exists but Data is null/empty
  - Layer has partial data (2 segments) → fills to 12 with None

This is a critical test update that validates the entire refactor:
1. Server enum mapping correctness
2. Layer selection logic
3. 12-segment fixed length guarantee
4. Fallback behavior
5. Value field removal

<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Rewrote BC-1 and BC-2 test cases for IIntAry layer-based WheelData structure</title>
  <subtitle>Tests now validate 12-segment layer selection, server enum mapping, and value field removal</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>BC-1 tests rewritten to validate ParseServerWheelData with IIntAry[] structure containing MG layer [{Data: [0,1,2,3,4,-1...]}] and FG layer, passing WheelDataLayer enum to select target</fact>
    <fact>BC-1 now validates all 6 ServerWheelFeature→FeatureWheelSegmentType mappings: FG(0)→FreeGame, Multi(1)→Multiplier, Upgrade(2)→Upgrade, Transfer(3)→SymbolConvert, Grand(4)→GrandJP, None(-1)→None</fact>
    <fact>BC-1 verifies value field removal by checking (mg[1] as any).value === undefined and tests dual-layer selection with FG layer returning fg[0]=GrandJP, fg[11]=FreeGame</fact>
    <fact>BC-2 tests rewritten with isDefault helper function validating entire SegmentDescriptor[] matches GetDefaultSegments type-by-type for 12-segment fallback scenarios</fact>
    <fact>BC-2 validates 8 fallback conditions: null/undefined/empty array input, missing target layer, layer with null/empty Data, and partial data (2 segments) filling to 12 with None type</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completely rewrote the BC-1 (normal parsing) and BC-2 (fallback) test cases to match the refactored ParseServerWheelData signature and behavior. BC-1 now tests the real IIntAry[] structure with two layers (MG and FG), validates layer selection via WheelDataLayer enum parameter, and comprehensively checks that all six ServerWheelFeature enum values map correctly through MapServerFeatureToSegmentType to the client FeatureWheelSegmentType (catching the "wrong icon" hazard this refactor was designed to prevent). The test explicitly validates value field removal by checking that even Multiplier segments have undefined value. BC-2 fallback tests leverage a new isDefault helper that compares the entire result array type-by-type against GetDefaultSegments, ensuring that eight different failure modes (null input, missing layers, malformed Data, partial segments) all correctly return the full 12-segment default configuration. The partial-data test specifically validates that when only 2 segments are provided, the adapter fills positions 2-11 with None type rather than crashing or padding with invalid data. These tests now comprehensively validate the layer-based adapter, enum safety, and segment count guarantee—the three pillars of the refactor.</narrative>

The user is observing changes to the test file where hardcoded values referencing 10 segments are being updated to use the FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT constant (12 segments) and comments are being updated to reflect the 12-segment wheel geometry (30 degrees per segment instead of 36 degrees for the old 10-segment wheel).

<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Updated remaining test hardcoded values to use 12-segment constants</title>
  <subtitle>Replaced hardcoded 10-segment loop bounds and assertions with FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT constant and updated angle comments</subtitle>
  <facts>

    <fact>BC-3 test comment updated from "SEGMENT_ANGLE; // 36" to "// 30（12 格）" reflecting geometry change from 10-segment (36°) to 12-segment (30°) wheel</fact>
    <fact>All test cases now dynamically reference FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT constant enabling future segment count changes without test code modifications</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed the test suite update by eliminating the final hardcoded references to the old 10-segment wheel configuration. The BC-3 angle calculation test previously only validated segments 0-9, now iterates through all 12 segments by using FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT as the loop bound. The helper test assertion for GetDefaultSegments length validation replaced the hardcoded "10" literal with the constant, maintaining consistency with BC-1 and BC-2 tests. Updated inline comment clarifying that FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_ANGLE now equals 30 degrees (360/12) instead of the old 36 degrees (360/10), providing immediate context for anyone reading the test. These changes complete the test suite refactor—all segment count assumptions now flow from the single FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT constant, eliminating magic numbers and making future maintenance safer. The test file is now fully aligned with the 12-segment IIntAry[] layer-based WheelData model.</narrative>

The user is continuing from a previous session where we completed a WheelData refactor. The summary shows we successfully integrated server WheelData, transitioned from 10 to 12 segments, removed value fields, and added proper enum mapping.

Now I'm seeing two new observations from the primary session:

1. A TypeScript compilation with `--ignoreDeprecations 6.0` that revealed actual errors, including:
   - `assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes.ts(58,14): error TS2741: Property '[FeatureWheelSegmentType.None]' is missing in type '{ 0: number; 1: number; 2: number; 3: number; 4: number; }' but required in type 'Readonly<Record<FeatureWheelSegmentType, number>>'.`

2. A Read of FeatureWheelTypes.ts showing the TYPE_ICON_CONFIG object around line 58

The error is clear: We added `FeatureWheelSegmentType.None = -1` to the enum, and TypeScript now requires TYPE_ICON_CONFIG to have an entry for it since it's declared as `Record<FeatureWheelSegmentType, number>`.

Looking at the summary, we added None type and have logic to handle it via ClearSprite(), but we didn't update TYPE_ICON_CONFIG to include a None entry.

The other errors in the output (EnterRespinState.ts, RoundEndState.ts, MultiplierManager.ts) appear to be pre-existing issues unrelated to our refactor.

I need to fix the TYPE_ICON_CONFIG to include the None type. Since None segments should clear the sprite (not show an icon), the config entry should probably point to an invalid/placeholder index, or we need to adjust the TypeToIconIndex function to handle None specially before looking it up.
Looking at the TYPE_ICON_CONFIG object, it's missing the None entry entirely. The TypeToIconIndex function retrieves values from this config, so I need to add `[FeatureWheelSegmentType.None]: -1` or some sentinel value to satisfy the type requirement. Since None segments don't display icons, I could either use -1 as a sentinel that TypeToIconIndex checks for, or add a guard clause in TypeToIconIndex that returns early for None types before accessing the config. The issue is that TypeScript requires TYPE_ICON_CONFIG to be a complete Record, but BindSegmentIcons already guards against None types before calling TypeToIconIndex. I can solve this by creating a separate type that excludes None from the enum, then use that for the Record definition. This way the type system accurately reflects that None doesn't need an icon mapping, maintaining type safety without adding unused placeholder values.
